actions.description: add a custom action for your app
actions.label: Run_URL_Search
actions.name: custom_action

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.example: The API key to use. Space = skip

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: {"query":"query { indicators(filters: { mode: and, filters: [], filterGroups: [ { mode: and, filters: [ { key: \"name\", values: [\"$get_alert_data.url.values.#\"] } ], filterGroups: [] } ] }) { edges { node { id name confidence description pattern valid_from valid_until revoked created modified createdBy { name } objectMarking { definition } objectLabel { value } indicator_types killChainPhases { phase_name } x_opencti_score x_opencti_detection } } } }"}

parameters.description: the path to add to the base url
parameters.name: path

parameters.description: Check if you want to verify request
parameters.name: ssl_verify

actions.description: Merges the data of incoming branches. Uses the input type to determine how to merge the data, and removes duplicates
actions.label: Merge_Searches
actions.name: merge_incoming_branches

actions.description: Runs python with the data input. Any prints will be returned.
actions.label: Normalize_Searches
actions.name: execute_python

parameters.description: The code to run. Can be a file ID from within Shuffle.
parameters.name: code
